history.text: Should I wear a jacket today?

I cannot determine if you should wear a jacket without knowing your current location and today's weather forecast. Please check a local weather app or site for your specific temperature and conditions. If it is below your comfort threshold (typically around 65°F/18°C) or raining, a jacket is recommended.
